citation_and_locator: Yiu, Carine Yuk-man (姚玉敏). 2016. 粵語繼續體「落去」和開始體「起嚟」的產生. New Horizons in the Study of Chinese, pp. 261-284; official CUHK PDF; abstract and pp. 261-263, 277-281; examples 1-8, 37, 61, 102-103, 120-121; https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/ics/clrc/yue/20_carine_yiu.pdf
what_it_supports: Directly identifies postpredicative 落去 as continuative for ongoing actions or maintained states; supplies modern and historical examples; distinguishes literal direction; documents adjacency/object restriction, potential participation, co-occurrence with 住, and direction-to-aspect grammaticalization.
limit: The study's historical corpus is not a modern acceptability panel; its lexical and syllable observations do not establish unrestricted productivity in every contemporary variety.
